privileged_info_summary: The meal_prep_consolidator task uses synthetic data hardcoded in setup_task.sh. Task contains 5 recipes with 13 unique ingredients and 6 pantry inventory items. All documented ingredient aggregation calculations are mathematically correct: chicken breast (2+2=4 lbs), onion (1+1+2+1+2=7 whole), garlic (2+2+2=6 cloves), bell pepper (2+1+1+1=5), olive oil (2+2=4 tbsp). All pantry deduction calculations verified: items to buy include chicken breast (4 lbs), onion (2), garlic (5 cloves), bell pepper (5), with olive oil and rice correctly excluded as fully stocked. Task difficulty is 'medium' with 180-second timeout and 15-step limit. Task uses ODF format (.ods) with 3 sheets: Recipes, Pantry, Shopping List. Verifier checks ingredient aggregation, pantry subtraction, formula-driven cells, proper filtering, and completeness with 75% pass threshold.
